data.description: Israel: The Grunis Committee unanimously approved the appointment of David Zini as the head of the Shin Bet.

data.title: Valence secures $50M in Series B funding for AI coaching platform, Nadia, to support Fortune 500 expansion.
data.description: Valence, the company responsible for Nadia, the world's pioneering enterprise AI coach, revealed today that it has secured new funding led by Bessemer Venture Partners. This injection of funds is aimed at propelling the company's growth as more Fortune 500 companies embrace AI coaching programs. The announcement was made in New York on September 25, 2025. This funding round will enable Valence to further expand its operations and enhance its AI coaching services.

data.title: Encompass Health opens first location in Connecticut, now accepting patients at Danbury hospital.
data.description: Encompass Health, the leading owner and operator of inpatient rehabilitation hospitals in the United States, has recently opened its inaugural facility in the state. This marks a significant milestone for the company, as they expand their services to more regions. Situated in BIRMINGHAM, Ala., this new location is now ready to serve patients seeking high-quality rehabilitation care. This development was announced on Sept. 25, 2025. Encompass Health's determination to provide exceptional care is evident in this expansion, which will enable them to assist a larger number of individuals in their recovery journeys.

data.title: Golar LNG prices $500 million senior notes due 2030 with 7.500% annual interest rate in private offering.
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda on September 25, 2025, Golar LNG Limited disclosed the pricing details of a private offering. The company, listed as GLNG on Nasdaq, revealed an Offering of $500 million in total principal amount of unsecured senior notes. These Notes are set to mature on October 2, 2030, with an annual interest rate of 7.500%. Issued at par, these senior unsecured obligations of the Company hold a due date in 2030.
NYMEX Gasoline October futures settle at $2.0022 a gallon.
NYMEX WTI Crude November futures settle at $64.98 a barrel, down 1 cent, 0.02%.
NYMEX Natural Gas October futures settle at $2.9040/MMBtu.

data.title: Suno introduces Suno Studio for all creatives, offering new workflows with AI stem generation. Artists and producers already using it are experiencing a paradigm shift in music creation.
data.description: Suno Studio is revolutionizing music creation with its advanced capabilities, including multi-track editing and AI stem generation. Artists and producers utilizing Suno Studio have reported a paradigm shift in their creative process, as the platform enables limitless imagination. Experience the impact of Suno Studio by watching the trailer and demo.

data.title: FleetMining launches free cloud mining for Bitcoin & Dogecoin, giving $15 bonus. Users can earn passive income online without hardware or fees.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Denver, CO, FleetMining, a cloud mining company based in the USA, launched a zero-cost cloud mining service allowing users to mine popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Dogecoin without the need for expensive hardware or electricity costs. The new platform offers a simplified method for both crypto enthusiasts and beginners to generate passive income through online mining. Users can sign up with just an email address and receive a complimentary $15 mining contract. FleetMining eliminates the complexities associated with traditional crypto mining by removing the necessity to buy mining equipment or maintain servers. Users can earn daily payouts through an easy-to-use interface. The platform supports mining for Bitcoin (BTC), Dogecoin (DOGE), and Litecoin (LTC).

data.title: BMO's Equity Through Education Trading Day on Sept. 24, 2025, raised C$1.5 million to support student success.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, BMO held its annual Equity Through Education trading day in Toronto, New York, and London. This event successfully raised C$1.5 million to support students in pursuing post-secondary education. Since the initiative was launched in 2005, BMO has been dedicated to contributing to this cause.

data.title: DCO Member States reaffirm commitment to digital cooperation at UNGA 80.
data.description: During the 80th United Nations General Assembly, member states of the Digital Cooperation Organization reiterated their dedication to digital collaboration in a collective declaration. The organization, comprising X countries, emphasized the importance of working together on digital initiatives to promote global progress and cooperation. This statement reflects their shared commitment to advancing digital technologies and ensuring their benefits are accessible to all nations.

data.title: Nexstar and Sinclair are boycotting Jimmy Kimmel for his remarks as they negotiate deals for their local TV stations.
data.description: Nexstar and Sinclair have announced a boycott against the late-night host concerning his recent remarks. However, both companies are currently considering potential agreements for their extensive networks of local TV stations.

data.title: Stryten Energy awarded 2025 Women's Choice Award for Best Company to Work, focuses on inclusion for women.
data.description: Stryten Energy LLC, a U.S. energy storage solutions provider located in Alpharetta, Georgia, recently received the prestigious 2025 Women’s Choice Award® for Best Companies to Work - Inclusion. This award recognizes companies dedicated to creating inclusive and supportive environments for women in the workforce. Wendy Henderson, the Senior Vice President and Chief Human Resource Officer at Stryten Energy LLC, expressed the company's commitment to ensuring a workplace where all employees can thrive. Henderson stated, “We strive to cultivate a work environment that promotes success for everyone.”
Goldman Sachs CEO Solomon: US inflation still feels like it has stickiness.

data.title: Jameson Irish Whiskey partners with NFL for first-ever game in Dublin at Croke Park on Sept. 28, 2025, celebrating with hometown spirit.
data.description: Jameson Irish Whiskey, the top-ranked Irish whiskey globally, is set to capture the essence of its homeland by catering to American football enthusiasts in Ireland during the game between the Minnesota Vikings and Pittsburgh Steelers at Croke Park on September 28, 2025. In a press release on September 25, 2025, the brand revealed its plans to offer its spirits at the event.

data.title: Google acquires 5.4% stake in Cipher Mining, with 24 million warrants in a $5 billion AI hosting deal, backstopping $1.4 billion for Texas data center, transforming CIFR into AI-crypto hybrid bet.
data.description: Cipher Mining Inc (CIFR) has recently received a significant endorsement from Alphabet Inc (GOOGL)(GOOG) as Google acquired a 5.4% stake in the Bitcoin miner. This deal includes about 24 million warrants as part of a 10-year agreement worth $5 billion focused on AI hosting. This move by Google provides substantial financial backing for Cipher's Texas data center expansion, securing $1.4 billion in financing. This partnership elevates Cipher from a specialized miner to a strategic play on the convergence of AI and cryptocurrency. This development comes amidst the unveiling of a $400 billion Stargate data project by OpenAI, SoftBank, and their collaborators. The stock performance of CIFR is worth watching in light of these recent developments.

The Panama Canal announced that lawmakers have approved a $5.21 billion budget for fiscal year 2025/26. Of this, $3.19 billion is expected to be contributed to the national treasury, marking a 14.5% increase year-on-year.

data.title: Raintree introduces NoteIQ™ AI-powered documentation at TherapyCon '25, eliminates manual input, validates info in UI.
data.description: NoteIQ™, an innovative AI-driven documentation tool, revolutionizes the process by removing the requirement for manual data entry or verification in Raintree's cutting-edge interface. The groundbreaking technology eliminates the need for manual intervention, offering a seamless experience for users. This development was announced in Chandler, Arizona on September 25, 2025, through a press release from PRNewswire. The tool is set to benefit hundreds of rehabilitation and physical therapy practitioners by boosting efficiency and accuracy in their daily tasks.
